_readme: Weights per use case — THE transparent heart of the scoring. Each usage score /100 = weighted average of the components below. Scale: AA indexes (artificial_analysis_*_index) are used as-is (~0-100); AA benchmarks (0-1) are multiplied by 100; web_access & editorial_crea are editorial fields (0-100) from models.json; context_log is the OpenRouter context window log-normalized between fixed anchors (16K → 0, 2M → 100) — fixed anchors, NOT cohort min-max, so scores stay stable day after day. If a component is null for a model, the remaining weights are renormalized. Missing data is never invented.
